Generated Narrative: ConceptMap message-vxu-v04-to-bundle

Mapping from (not specified) to (not specified)


Group 1 Mapping from unspecified code system to unspecified code system

Source Concept DetailsRelationshipTarget Concept DetailsComment
Codes from NarrativeConditionComputableFHIRPathComputableANTLRCodes from
VXU_V04.MSHMessage Headeris equivalent toBundleBundle
VXU_V04.MSHMessage Header Segmentis equivalent toMessageHeader[1]MessageHeader[1]Processing of the MSH segment results in the creation of a new MessageHeader resource
VXU_V04.MSHMessage Header SegmentIf there is a source in MSH-4, or known based on the configuration.is equivalent toProvenance[1]Provenance[1]If the FHIR transformation does not yield a FHIR message, but only a set of resource (APIs, repository, etc.) than one should consider attaching this Provenance resource instance to the relevant FHIR resources generated.
VXU_V04.MSHMessage Header Segmentis equivalent toProvenance[2]Provenance[2]If the FHIR transformation does not yield a FHIR Bunlde, but only a set of resource (APIs, repository, etc.) than one should consider attaching this Provenance resource instance to the relevant FHIR resources generated.
VXU_V04.SFTSoftwareIf the software does represent not the original source systemis equivalent toProvenance[1].entity.what(Device)Provenance[1].entity.what(Device)
VXU_V04.SFTSoftwareIf the software represents the original source systemis equivalent toProvenance[1].entity.what(Device)Provenance[1].entity.what(Device)
VXU_V04.PIDPatient Identification Segmentis equivalent toPatient[1]Patient[1]Processing of the PID segment results in the creation of a new Patient resource
VXU_V04.PIDPatient Identification SegmentOne may drop PID-33 from the condition if PID-34 Last Update Facility is still sufficient without a date.IF PID-33 AND PID-34 VALUEDis equivalent toProvenance[4]Provenance[4]
VXU_V04.PD1Additional Demographicsis equivalent toPatient[1]Patient[1]Incorporate PD1 content into the Patient created from the PID segment.
VXU_V04.PD1Additional DemographicsIF PD1-7 VALUEDis equivalent toObservation[3]Observation[3]
VXU_V04.NK1Next of Kin/Associated Partiesis equivalent toRelatedPerson[1]RelatedPerson[1]Typically, each NK1 will be translated to either a new RelatedPerson resource or added as a new occurrence of Patient.contact, but it's possible to insert the NK1 data into both structures.
VXU_V04.NK1Next of Kin/Associated Partiesis equivalent toPatient[1]Patient[1]
VXU_V04.PATIENT_VISIT.PV1Patient VisitOnly if the system wants to know about the encounter related to the immunization eventis equivalent toEncounter[1]Encounter[1]Processing of the PV1 segment results in the creation of a new Encounter resource
VXU_V04.PATIENT_VISIT.PV1Patient VisitIF PV1-43 VALUEDis equivalent toBasicBasic
VXU_V04.PATIENT_VISIT.PV1Patient Visitis equivalent toPatient[1]Patient[1]
VXU_V04.PATIENT_VISIT.PV1Patient VisitIF PV1-20 VALUEis equivalent toCoverage[1]Coverage[1]
VXU_V04.PATIENT_VISIT.PV2Patient Visit – Additional Infois equivalent toEncounter[1]Encounter[1]Incorporate PV2 content into the Encounter created from the PV1 segment.
VXU_V04.PERSON_OBSERVATION.OBXObservation/ResultIF OBX-5 LST.count LESS THAN OR EQUALS 1 OR OBX-2 IS "NA"is equivalent toObservation[1]Observation[1]
VXU_V04.PERSON_OBSERVATION.OBXObservation/ResultIF OBX-5 LST.count GREATER THAN 1 AND OBX-2 IS NOT "NA"is equivalent toObservation[1]Observation[1]Note that when OBX-5 repeats, the standard mapping is to use Observation.component (see OBX[Observation-Component] map) rather than creating separate Observation instances. However, we are aware that some profiles and implementation guides do separate the OBX into multiple observations depending on the OBX-2 value. This is an example of a non-standard interpretation as the OBX should have been separated into multiple OBX segments to start. Please consider the local profiles and implementation guides on how to manage these variants.
VXU_V04.PERSON_OBSERVATION.PRTParticipation (for Observation)IF PRT-10 VALUEDis equivalent toDevice[1]Device[1]
VXU_V04.PERSON_OBSERVATION.PRTParticipation (for Observation)IF PRT-9 VALUED OR IF PRT-14 VALUEDis equivalent toObservation[1]Observation[1]At this time we don't know of a use case for sending a location PRT to a patient level observations. We've provided a mapping from PRT to Location but not way to link it to other resources in the Bundle. If there is a known use case, please comment on it so that we can develop a solution.
VXU_V04.PERSON_OBSERVATION.PRTParticipation (for Observation)IF PRT-5 VALUEDis equivalent toPractitionerRole[1]PractitionerRole[1]
VXU_V04.PERSON_OBSERVATION.NTENotes (Regarding Patient Observation)is equivalent toObservation[1].noteObservation[1].note
VXU_V04.ORDER.ORCCommon Orderis equivalent toImmunization[1]Immunization[1]Processing of each ORC segment results in the creation of a new Immunization resource
VXU_V04.ORDER.ORCCommon OrderOnly if the system wants to know about the order that lead to the immunization eventis equivalent toServiceRequest[1]ServiceRequest[1]Processing of each ORC segment results in the creation of a new ServiceRequest resource if the receiving system wants to know about the order that lead to the immunization event
VXU_V04.ORDER.PRTParticipation (for ORC)(element("4.1")="OP")and(element("4.3")="HL70443")IF PRT-4.1 EQUALS "OP" AND PRT-4.3 EQUALS "HL70443"is equivalent toPractitionerRole[2]PractitionerRole[2]Processing of each PRT segment typically results in the creation of a new Practitioner or PractitionerRole resource. The decision between creating a Practitioner or PractitionerRole resource may depend on the availability of data related to the practitioner's role elsewhere in the message. It may be possible to reuse a Practitioner resource in the bundle created from somewhere else in the bundle rather than creating a new resource for each PRT segment (eg, the same administering practictioner resource could be pointed to from multiple order segment groups) - if an implementer decides to do this, the system must be certain that it's the same person (same name, ID, etc) potentially even playing the same role (if the bundle uses PractitionerRole in addition to Practitioner).\
VXU_V04.ORDER.PRTParticipation (for ORC)(element("4.1")="OP")and(element("4.3")="HL70443")IF PRT-4.1 EQUALS "OP" AND PRT-4.3 EQUALS "HL70443"is equivalent toImmunization[1].performer.function.coding.code= "OP'"
VXU_V04.ORDER.PRTParticipation (for ORC)(element("4.1")="OP")and(element("4.3")="HL70443")IF PRT-4.1 EQUALS "OP" AND PRT-4.3 EQUALS "HL70443"is equivalent toImmunization[1].performer.function.coding.system= "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0443"
VXU_V04.ORDER.PRTParticipation (for ORC)(element("4.1")="AP")and(element("4.3")="HL70443")IF PRT-4.1 EQUALS "AP" AND PRT-4.3 EQUALS "HL70443"is equivalent toPractitionerRole[3]PractitionerRole[3]
VXU_V04.ORDER.PRTParticipation (for ORC)(element("4.1")="AP")and(element("4.3")="HL70443")IF PRT-4.1 EQUALS "AP" AND PRT-4.3 EQUALS "HL70443"is equivalent toImmunization[1].performer.function.coding.code= "AP'"
VXU_V04.ORDER.PRTParticipation (for ORC)(element("4.1")="AP")and(element("4.3")="HL70443")IF PRT-4.1 EQUALS "AP" AND PRT-4.3 EQUALS "HL70443"is equivalent toImmunization[1].performer.function.coding.system= "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0443"
VXU_V04.ORDER.RXAPharmacy Administration Segmentis equivalent toImmunization[1]Immunization[1]Incorporate RXA content into the Immunization created from the ORC segment in the same segment group.
VXU_V04.ORDER.RXRPharmacy Routeis equivalent toImmunization[1]Immunization[1]Incorporate RXR content into the Immunization created from the ORC segment in the same segment group.
VXU_V04.ORDER.OBSERVATION.OBXObservation/ResultSome observations about the immunization may map to elements within the Immuniation resource rather than an independent Observation resource. For example, funding source, patient eligibility and educational material are often sent as OBX segments but map to Immunization elements. Specific guidance on how to map, e.g., the US CDC implementation guide on immunizations, will be provided separately at a future time TBD.IF OBX-5 LST.count LESS THAN OR EQUALS 1 AND OBX-2 IS "NA"is equivalent toObservation[2]Observation[2]
VXU_V04.ORDER.OBSERVATION.OBXObservation/ResultSome observations about the immunization may map to elements within the Immuniation resource rather than an independent Observation resource. For example, funding source, patient eligibility and educational material are often sent as OBX segments but map to Immunization elements. Specific guidance on how to map, e.g., the US CDC implementation guide on immunizations, will be provided separately at a future time TBD.IF OBX-5 LST.count GREATER THAN 1 AND OBX-2 IS NOT "NA"is equivalent toObservation[2]Observation[2]
VXU_V04.ORDER.OBSERVATION.PRTParticipation (for Observation)IF PRT-10 VALUEDis equivalent toDevice[2]Device[2]
VXU_V04.ORDER.OBSERVATION.PRTParticipation (for Observation)IF PRT-9 VALUED OR IF PRT-14 VALUEDis equivalent toObservation[2]Observation[2]
VXU_V04.ORDER.OBSERVATION.PRTParticipation (for Observation)IF PRT-5 VALUEDis equivalent toPractitionerRole[4]PractitionerRole[4]
VXU_V04.ORDER.OBSERVATION.NTENotes (Regarding Immunization)is equivalent toObservation[2].noteObservation[2].note

name: MessageVXU_V04ToBundle
title: Message VXU_V04 to Bundle Map
description: This ConceptMap represents a mapping from the HL7 V2 Message VXU_V04 to the FHIR Message Bundle.
copyright: Copyright (c) 2025, HL7 International, Inc., All Rights Reserved.

target.comment: Processing of the MSH segment results in the creation of a new MessageHeader resource

If the FHIR transformation does not yield a FHIR message, but only a set of resource (APIs, repository, etc.) than one should consider attaching this Provenance resource instance to the relevant FHIR resources generated.

dependsOn.value: If there is a source in MSH-4, or known based on the configuration.

target.comment: If the FHIR transformation does not yield a FHIR Bunlde, but only a set of resource (APIs, repository, etc.) than one should consider attaching this Provenance resource instance to the relevant FHIR resources generated.

dependsOn.value: If the software does represent not the original source system
If the software represents the original source system

target.comment: Processing of the PID segment results in the creation of a new Patient resource

dependsOn.value: IF PID-33 AND PID-34 VALUED
One  may drop PID-33 from the condition if PID-34 Last Update Facility is still sufficient without a date.

target.comment: Incorporate PD1 content into the Patient created from the PID segment.

dependsOn.value: IF PD1-7 VALUED

target.comment: Typically, each NK1 will be translated to either a new RelatedPerson resource or added as a new occurrence of Patient.contact, but it's possible to insert the NK1 data into both structures.
Processing of the PV1 segment results in the creation of a new Encounter resource

dependsOn.value: Only if the system wants to know about the encounter related to the immunization event
IF PV1-43 VALUED
IF PV1-20 VALUE

target.comment: Incorporate PV2 content into the Encounter created from the PV1 segment.

dependsOn.value: IF OBX-5 LST.count LESS THAN OR EQUALS 1 OR OBX-2 IS "NA"

target.comment: Note that when OBX-5 repeats, the standard mapping is to use Observation.component (see OBX[Observation-Component] map) rather than creating separate Observation instances.  However, we are aware that some profiles and implementation guides do separate the OBX into multiple observations depending on the OBX-2 value.  This is an example of a non-standard interpretation as the OBX should have been separated into multiple OBX segments to start.  Please consider the local profiles and implementation guides on how to manage these variants.

dependsOn.value: IF  OBX-5 LST.count GREATER THAN 1 AND OBX-2 IS NOT "NA"
IF PRT-10 VALUED

target.comment: At this time we don't know of a use case for sending a location PRT to a patient level observations. We've provided a mapping from PRT to Location but not way to link it to other resources in the Bundle. If there is a known use case, please comment on it so that we can develop a solution.

dependsOn.value: IF PRT-9 VALUED OR IF PRT-14 VALUED
IF PRT-5 VALUED

target.comment: Processing of each ORC segment results in the creation of a new Immunization resource
Processing of each ORC segment results in the creation of a new ServiceRequest resource if the receiving system wants to know about the order that lead to the immunization event

dependsOn.value: Only if the system wants to know about the order that lead to the immunization event

target.comment:
Processing of each PRT segment typically results in the creation of a new Practitioner or PractitionerRole resource. 

The decision between creating a Practitioner or PractitionerRole resource may depend on the availability of data related to the practitioner's role elsewhere in the message.

It may be possible to reuse a Practitioner resource in the bundle created from somewhere else in the bundle rather than creating a new resource for each PRT segment (eg, the same administering practictioner resource could be pointed to from multiple order segment groups) - if an implementer decides to do this, the system must be certain that it's the same person (same name, ID, etc) potentially even playing the same role (if the bundle uses PractitionerRole in addition to Practitioner).\

dependsOn.value: IF PRT-4.1 EQUALS "OP" AND PRT-4.3 EQUALS "HL70443"
(element("4.1")="OP")and(element("4.3")="HL70443")

(element("4.1")="AP")and(element("4.3")="HL70443")
IF PRT-4.1 EQUALS "AP" AND PRT-4.3 EQUALS "HL70443"
(element("4.1")="AP")and(element("4.3")="HL70443")

target.comment: Incorporate RXA content into the Immunization created from the ORC segment in the same segment group.
Incorporate RXR content into the Immunization created from the ORC segment in the same segment group.

dependsOn.value: IF OBX-5 LST.count LESS THAN OR EQUALS 1 AND OBX-2 IS "NA"

Some observations about the immunization may map to elements within the Immuniation resource rather than an independent Observation resource. For example, funding source, patient eligibility and educational material are often sent as OBX segments but map to Immunization elements.  Specific guidance on how to map, e.g., the US CDC implementation guide on immunizations, will be provided separately at a future time TBD.
IF OBX-5 LST.count GREATER THAN 1 AND OBX-2 IS NOT "NA"

Some observations about the immunization may map to elements within the Immuniation resource rather than an independent Observation resource. For example, funding source, patient eligibility and educational material are often sent as OBX segments but map to Immunization elements.  Specific guidance on how to map, e.g., the US CDC implementation guide on immunizations, will be provided separately at a future time TBD.
IF PRT-10 VALUED
IF PRT-9 VALUED OR IF PRT-14 VALUED
IF PRT-5 VALUED
